basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Technical Support-III Notification 2026 has been released on 29-06-2026 on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Three years graduate degree in psychology + three years post qualification experience OR Postgraduate in Psychology
qualification.details: Three years graduate degree in psychology + three years post qualification experience OR Postgraduate in Psychology

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III posts is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support-III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support-III position at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a three-year graduate degree in psychology with three years of post-qualification experience, or a postgraduate degree in psychology.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support-III position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-III role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 28,000 to Rs. 36,400 per month, plus HRA at 30%.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official AIIMS Delhi website.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
